quranSection.title: Saurari Alƙur’ani Mai Girma
quranSection.subtitle: Ka ji kwanciyar hankali ta ruhaniya ta hanyar kyawawan karatun Alƙur’ani daga shahararrun masu karatu a duniya
quranSection.getStartedSubtitle: Danna ƙasa don loda mai kunnawa na Alƙur’ani.

quote.text: Lalle Mu ne muka saukar da Alƙur’ani, kuma lalle Mu ne za mu kiyaye shi.

ui.searchSurahPlaceholder: Nemo sura da suna ko lamba...
